name: effect-junction
description: Design-first TypeScript model for Effect Junction attributes, prescriptions, and reports.

scripts.web:build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/web && cp src/web/index.html dist/web/index.html && cp src/web/styles.css dist/web/styles.css
scripts.web:serve: npm run web:build && python3 -m http.server 4173 -d dist
